title: Prem Granth
desc: Somen, a rich man, falls in love with Kajri, a village belle. However, they get separated when she suddenly leaves for unknown reasons.

title: Jigar
desc: When Raju's sister is molested and killed by a dodgy karate boxer, he seeks Baba Thakur's help, to train and become an expert in karate.

title: Hero No. 1
desc: Meena and Rajesh, in love, face family opposition to their marriage. Rajesh disguises himself as a servant in Meena's house to win over her father and get his blessing.

title: Lal Baadshah
desc: A mysterious connection exists between a man living in a basti and a Dewan who concealed the Maharaja's treasure, revealing hidden truths.

title: Krishna Sudama
desc: Krishna Sudama tells the heartwarming tale of friendship between Lord Krishna and his poor childhood friend Sudama, highlighting true devotion and unconditional love.

title: Teleshopping
desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Jeene Do
desc: Thakur Sher Bahadur Singh is a powerful landlord who gives Suraj a loan to pursue his studies in Mumbai. When Suraj leaves the village, the thakur exploits Suraj's father and his brother Karamveer.

title: Devaru Bekagidare
desc: Ranganna adopts a baby, Appu who is the sole survivor of an accident. When Ranganna dies, Appu decides to set out in search of his real family.

title: Teleshopping
desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.
